# Security Policy

## 🔐 Reporting Security Issues

**Please do not report security vulnerabilities through public GitHub issues.**

Instead, please report them via:

- **Email:** security@example.com
- **GitHub Security Advisory:** [Report a vulnerability](https://github.com/77Negativo/observability-sec/security/advisories/new)

## ⏱️ Response Times

- **Initial Response:** Within 48 hours
- **Status Update:** Within 5 business days
- **Resolution:** Based on severity (see full policy)

## 📋 What to Include

- Description of the vulnerability
- Steps to reproduce
- Potential impact
- Affected versions
- Suggested fix (if any)

## 🔒 Security Best Practices

When using org-security-scan:

1. **Use minimal token permissions:**
   - `repo` (read only)
   - `admin:org:read`
   - `read:user` (optional)

2. **Rotate tokens every 90 days**

3. **Enable 2FA** on your account

4. **Review workflow permissions** regularly

## 📚 Full Security Policy

For the complete security policy, see [SECURITY.md](../SECURITY.md)
